prompt: Bridge node with positive toCall and poor price: choose action.
why_v1: When the price is too poor to continue, folding is cleaner than paying for a bad call.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. The price is too poor to continue, so folding saves chips instead of paying for a bad call.

feedback_incorrect_by_action_v1.call: Incorrect. Calling pays a bad price to keep going, so folding is cleaner once the continue price gets this poor.
feedback_incorrect_by_action_v1.raise: Incorrect. Raising stretches an already bad-price continue into a bigger leak, so the cleaner choice is to fold.

feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. When the price is too poor to continue, folding is cleaner than paying for a bad call.
